novel_features.name: Local resource archive
novel_features.description: Sync DigitalOcean resources into a local SQLite store for offline inspection and repeatable agent workflows.

novel_features.name: Full-text cloud search
novel_features.description: Search synced DigitalOcean data locally, with live/local source selection for agent-friendly retrieval.

novel_features.name: Archive analytics
novel_features.description: Summarize locally synced resource data with count and group-by operations.

novel_features.name: Polling tail
novel_features.description: Poll selected resources and emit change events as NDJSON for shell and agent pipelines.
